title: Ubiquiti UDM - UniFi Dream Machine
description: The UniFi Dream Machine from Ubiquiti is a complex network solution for homes and small offices. It is a very powerful device with 4-core CPU, 2GB RAM and combines all the necessary functions into one elegant box that manages: Dual Band WiFi AP supports 802.11a/b/g/n/ac/ac-wave2 (4x4), 1733 + 300Mbps Manageable 4-ports Gigabit switch with VLAN support UniFi Security Gateway - offers advanced firewall policies and persistent threat management to act as an Intrusion Prevention System (IPS) and Intrusion Detection System (IDS) UniFi Controller - The UniFi Network Controller can provision UniFi devices, map out networks, and quickly manage system traffic The UDM is the ideal first UniFi device. Itâs easy to use and still offers all the benefits of UniFi for homes and businesses. Easily expand the UDM by adding more UniFi Switches or APs while managing the network with the integrated controller The UniFi Network app and UniFi cloud provide remote access to the controller from anywhere. The entire network can be kept updated and safe with automated software updates, which are free of charge Zero Handoff Roaming - uninterrupted transition between APs Wireless uplink (fits where the data cable cannot be reached) Up to 8 SSID Detailed traffic statistics Guest network Load balance of clients Speed limit for each SSID Device Power cord
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11ac, 802.11ac - wave2, 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11b/g MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 1733 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 300 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 23 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 26 Security WEP, WPA-PSK, WPA-Enterprise (WPA/WPA2, TKIP/AES) 802.1w/PMF 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 4 x 4 Type of antenna Built-in Internal antennas 4 Roaming Yes Antenna gain [dBi] 3, 4,5 Connectors and Interfaces WAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps LAN speed (4) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Max. power consumption [W] 26 Power via connector/terminal 230V AC Physical characteristics Design Desktop Purpose Indoor Fans No Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 10 up to 45 Weight [g] 1050 Width [mm] 110 Height [mm] 184 Depth [mm] 110 Hardware CPU ARM Cortex-A57 CPU frequency [MHz] 1700 RAM [MB] 2048
